content:
📺 Streaming Digest — Week of June 8, 2026

Apple TV+
- Cape Fear — New Series | Thriller | Javier Bardem plays a freed ex-con who terrorizes the lawyers who imprisoned him, in this modern series adaptation of the classic thriller. (Premiered June 5)

Crunchyroll
Nothing new this week. (Baki-Dou: The Invincible Samurai Part 2 arrives June 18; Mushoku Tensei Season 3 and Red River land late June/early July.)

Prime Video
⭐ The Legend of Vox Machina Season 4 — New Season | Sci-Fi/Fantasy | The dysfunctional adventuring party reunites after a long-dormant evil awakens following their defeat of the Chroma Conclave. (Premiered June 3)
- Clarkson's Farm Season 5 — New Season | Documentary/Reality | Jeremy Clarkson rethinks Diddly Squat Farm as a new UK agricultural budget disrupts the farming industry. (Premiered June 3)
- Every Year After — New Series | Romance/Drama | Childhood friends reconnect years later and question whether their bond was always meant to become something more, set in a Canadian lake town. (Premiered June 10)

⭐ = matches Charlie's preferred genres (anime, sci-fi/fantasy, comedy)
